results.prompt: Create a complete TypeScript library monorepo starter, not a marketing page. It must include package metadata, workspace setup, a core library entrypoint, strict tsconfig, a build script, tests, changeset/release notes, and a tiny Prisma generator example that shows how generated enums or types can reduce bundle size.
